description: Create a Verbal Recognition Memory experiment in PsychoPy Builder at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/recognition_confidence.psyexp. The experiment consists of a Study Phase, a distractor task, and a Test Phase. In the Study Phase, display words from /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/study_list.csv (Garden, Market, Office, Planet, Winter) for 2.0 seconds each. The distractor task requires participants to count backwards from 100 by 7s, ending on a Space key press. The Test Phase uses /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/test_list.csv, which includes the 5 study words (type='old', corrAns='y') and 5 new words (Doctor, Fabric, Jungle, Moment, Village; type='new', corrAns='n'). During the Test Phase, participants indicate if they recognize a word ('y'/'n'). If the response is 'y' (Old), present a confidence rating slider (1-100); if the response is 'n' (New), the confidence rating must be skipped. Ensure all data files are created at their specified paths in /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/.
